title: AWS From Zero to Production
description: A comprehensive AWS series covering fundamentals (IAM, VPC, EC2, S3) through production-grade architecture, monitoring, and CI/CD — designed for developers transitioning from theory to real-world AWS deployments.
author: Abhishek-sinha

title: Playwright with Java - Zero to Automation
description: A hands-on series that takes complete beginners from writing their first test to building a full AI-assisted automation framework using Playwright and Java. No prior testing experience needed.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Postman API Automation Mastery
description: A complete roadmap to mastering API testing with Postman. Learn everything from basic workspace organization to advanced CI/CD integration, schema validation, and data-driven testing using Newman.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Mastering the MyCodeYatra Mock API Server
description: A comprehensive 14-part guide designed for QA Engineers and Developers to simulate real-world backend scenarios.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Java RestAssured API Testing
description: Master API Test Automation using Java, RestAssured, TestNG, and Allure.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Mastering NodeJS API Testing with SuperTest
description: A complete 16-part masterclass on building enterprise-grade API test automation frameworks using SuperTest, Jest, and TypeScript.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: BDD API Testing with Karate DSL
description: A comprehensive 10-part series covering everything from basic BDD Gherkin syntax to advanced Karate Gatling performance testing and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Docker Zero to Production
description: A beginner-friendly series that walks you through Docker Desktop, Docker Hub, and writing production-ready docker-compose.yml files for dev, staging, and production environments.
author: Abhishek-sinha

title: Kafka Event-Driven Testing Masterclass
description: A comprehensive 15-part series covering everything from basic async message validation to schema registries, consumer lag monitoring, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Selenium with Java - Zero to Automation
description: Master UI automation testing using Selenium WebDriver and Java.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Framework Design & Patterns in Java
description: Learn advanced design patterns, utility structures, logging, dependency injection, and framework design using Selenium with Java.

title: Selenium & API Hybrid Framework
description: Learn how to build a highly scalable, blazing fast Enterprise Hybrid Test Framework by seamlessly merging Selenium WebDriver UI Automation with RestAssured API Testing.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Authentication Mastery
description: Master complex authentication flows in Selenium, from cookie management and session handling to modern SSO and MFA architectures.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Security Testing
description: Shift-left your security testing by integrating OWASP ZAP, CSP validation, and Security Header checks directly into your Selenium Java automation framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Visual Testing
description: Ensure pixel-perfect UIs across all devices. Learn to integrate open-source tools like AShot and AI-driven platforms like Applitools Eyes and Percy into your Java automation framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Advanced Accessibility Testing
description: Ensure your web applications are usable by everyone. Learn to automate WCAG compliance checks, integrate Axe-Core, and test for keyboard navigation and screen reader support.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python: Foundations
description: Master the absolute basics of Selenium WebDriver with Python. Learn how to set up your environment, manage web elements, and write your first robust tests using the powerful pytest framework.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python - Core UI Automation
description: Dive deep into complex UI interactions. Learn advanced element location, wait strategies, window handling, and Shadow DOM manipulation with Selenium Python.
author: pankaj-kumar

title: Selenium Python: Test Design & Architecture
description: Master advanced UI automation design patterns including Page Object Model, Data-Driven Testing, and custom Framework architecture in Python.

title: Selenium Python: Enterprise Framework
description: Learn how to build a scalable, enterprise-grade Selenium Python framework from scratch including custom utilities, configuration managers, and logging.

title: Python API Testing with Requests
description: Master backend automation in Python using the powerful Requests library. Learn how to validate JSON, handle OAuth, build data-driven suites, and integrate API testing with your Selenium framework.

title: Python Authentication & Security in Selenium
description: Master advanced security and authentication workflows! Learn how to manipulate browser cookies, bypass complex Single Sign-On (SSO) gateways, automate Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), and secure your Python Selenium framework.

title: Selenium Python Security
description: Learn how to automate DevSecOps, validate HTTP headers, parse CSPs, and integrate OWASP ZAP with Selenium.

title: Selenium Python Visual Testing
description: Learn how to detect CSS regressions and broken UI elements using pixel matching algorithms and AI visual testing tools.

title: Selenium Python CI/CD Pipelines
description: Learn how to build enterprise DevSecOps pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Docker Grids, and Allure reporting for your Python automation framework.

title: Selenium Python Behavior-Driven Development
description: Master Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) using Python! Learn Gherkin syntax, pytest-bdd, feature files, step definitions, and Data-Driven Scenario Outlines.

title: Selenium Python Enterprise Validation
description: Master full-stack enterprise validation! Learn how to combine Selenium UI testing with backend Database queries (SQL/NoSQL), Kafka events, and file processing (PDF/Excel) natively in Python.

title: Selenium Python Reporting & Observability
description: Transform automated test output into enterprise intelligence! Learn advanced Allure, pytest-html, custom metrics, and CI/CD dashboard integrations.

title: Selenium Python Cloud Grids & DevOps
description: Master massive scale test execution! Learn how to deploy Docker and Kubernetes clusters, and integrate external device farms like BrowserStack and Sauce Labs into your pipelines.

title: Selenium Python AI Automation
description: Welcome to the future of QA! Learn how to integrate Large Language Models (LLMs), LangChain, and autonomous AI Agents into your test automation framework to auto-generate code and self-heal broken locators.

title: Selenium Python Accessibility Testing
description: Shift accessibility testing to the left! Learn how to use axe-core and Python to build automated test suites that enforce ADA and WCAG compliance on every CI/CD run.

title: Selenium Java BDD & Cucumber Mastery
description: Master Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) in Java! Learn how to build scalable Enterprise architectures using Cucumber, Gherkin, PicoContainer, and Serenity BDD.

title: Selenium TypeScript Foundations
description: Master UI Automation using modern TypeScript. Learn how to configure Node.js, Jest, and Selenium WebDriver to build highly scalable enterprise frameworks.

title: TypeScript UI Automation Mastery
description: Master the core interactions of UI Automation in TypeScript. Learn to handle dynamic waits, complex forms, iFrames, Shadows DOMs, and multiple browser windows.

title: TypeScript Advanced Architecture & Patterns
description: Transition from scripts to Enterprise frameworks. Learn Data Driven Testing, Page Object Model, Factory Patterns, and the advanced Screenplay Pattern.

title: TypeScript Framework Utilities & Configuration
description: Learn to scale your test automation framework by building reusable Utility classes, Environment Configuration Management, and robust Logging.

title: TypeScript API Testing Integration
description: Shift left by implementing REST API automation using Axios. Learn to build GET/POST validations and hybrid UI-API frameworks.

title: TypeScript Security Testing Automation
description: Shift left on security! Learn how to automate the validation of HTTP headers, Content Security Policies (CSP), and JWT token vulnerabilities.

title: TypeScript Visual Automation Testing
description: Ensure pixel-perfect UI across all browsers by integrating Visual Regression Testing, Applitools Eyes, and Percy into your Selenium framework.

title: TypeScript Accessibility Testing Automation
description: Ensure your web applications are compliant with WCAG guidelines by integrating Axe Core and accessibility testing patterns into Selenium.

title: TypeScript BDD & Cucumber Framework
description: Bridge the gap between business and engineering by writing executable specifications in plain English using BDD, Cucumber, and Gherkin with Selenium TypeScript.

title: TypeScript CI/CD & DevOps Integration
description: Take your Selenium automation to the cloud! Learn to build robust Continuous Integration pipelines using GitHub Actions, manage secrets, and execute cross-browser testing inside Docker containers.

title: TypeScript Advanced Reporting & Analytics
description: Transform your raw test output into stunning, executive-friendly dashboards. Master Allure Reports, attach failure screenshots, and analyze flakiness metrics.

title: TypeScript QA Observability & Enterprise Monitoring
description: Gain real-time visibility into your test automation framework. Master APM integrations, log aggregation strategies, and design highly scalable observability architectures for your CI/CD pipelines.

title: TypeScript QA DevOps & Cloud Execution
description: Master the CI/CD execution layer. Package tests in Docker, orchestrate workflows in GitHub Actions and CircleCI, and execute massive parallel runs on BrowserStack and SauceLabs.

title: TypeScript QA AI & Autonomous Agents
description: The final frontier. Master Prompt Engineering, implement AI-driven Self-Healing locators, and build fully Autonomous Testing Agents using LangChain and MCP integration.

title: TypeScript QA Enterprise Data Validation
description: Stop trusting the UI. Master Enterprise Validation by learning how to assert system state directly in SQL/NoSQL databases, Kafka event streams, Email servers, and raw PDF/Excel files.

title: Python QA Analytics
description: Failure analysis, flaky tests, and reporting for Python Automation.

title: Python QA Observability
description: Integrating Pytest with APM tools like Datadog and Log Aggregation.

title: Selenium Java Security Testing
description: Learn how to detect security vulnerabilities, validate headers, and intercept network traffic using Selenium Java.

title: Selenium Java Visual Testing
description: Learn how to detect CSS rendering bugs and perform pixel-perfect AI image comparisons in Java.

title: Selenium Java Accessibility Testing
description: Ensure ADA and WCAG compliance by injecting Axe-Core into your Selenium automation to detect UI violations.

title: Selenium Java Database Testing
description: Go beyond the UI. Connect Selenium Java directly to SQL and NoSQL databases to assert backend system state.

title: Selenium Java Enterprise File & Event Validation
description: Go beyond the browser. Learn how to automate Email inboxes, parse PDF documents, and validate Excel files directly within your Selenium framework.
